items.name: agents
items.description: A framework for building realtime voice AI agents 🤖🎙️📹

items.name: notebooklm-py
items.description: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

items.name: openchrome
items.description: Open-source browser automation MCP server. Control your real Chrome from any AI agent.

items.name: Sage
items.description: Multi-Agent System Framework For Complex Tasks

items.name: OpenViking
items.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

items.name: qwen-code
items.description: An open-source AI agent that lives in your terminal.

items.name: OpenContracts
items.description: Humans and AI agents, building knowledge bases together. Self-hosted document annotation, version control, semantic search, and MCP.

items.name: costrict
items.description: Costrict - strict AI coder for enterprises, quality first, including AI Agent, AI CodeReview, AI Completion.

items.name: goose
items.description: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM
